channel.title: Nuxtjs on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Nuxtjs on Arrans github.io

item.title: vuesion/vuesion
item.description: Vuesion is a boilerplate that empowers product teams to build faster with modern best practices across engineering and design. It features a full-stack framework, comprehensive design system, robust testing, and seamless internationalization.

item.title: ljvmiranda921/sprites-as-a-service
item.description: Generate your personal 8-bit avatars using Cellular Automata, a mathematical model that simulates life, survival, and extinction
